title: pimelea curviflora var. micrantha
intro: Pimelea curviflora var. micrantha, commonly known as dwarf native currant, is a shrubby plant native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Pimelea curviflora var. micrantha include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
